name: Easy White Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package White cake mix w/ pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first three ingredients (cake mix, egg whites, and water) as directed on the cake box.
2. Measure the white chocolate and melt it.
3. Add the melted chocolate to the cake batter.
4. Follow the remaining instructions on the cake box.
This recipe is great with raspberry filling.
